why_this_action.reasoning: The selector was treating the execution board as empty for repair escalation even when the waiting section still contained live review-window blockers, which caused repeat distribution_architecture_repair churn instead of truthful hold behavior.
supporting_reasons: The current board contains the explicit empty marker plus an active directory secondary-surface repair blocker in the same waiting section.
Before the patch, choose_distribution_lane(2026-05-27T06:10:00) selected distribution_architecture_repair against that board state.
After the patch, the same dry run selects measurement_hold, which matches the live review-window truth instead of inventing another repair cycle.

result.summary: Patched execution-board waiting-block parsing and empty-marker handling so active review-window blockers no longer trigger false empty-board repair escalation.
